mapper.insert:
insert into cost (id,type, class, time, iet, money, data, settle, state) values
(#{item.id},#{item.type},#{item.cls},#{item.time},#{item.iet},#{item.money},#{item.data},#{item.settle},#{item.state})
INSERT INTO cost (id, type, class, time, iet, money, data, settle, state) VALUES (#{id}, #{type}, #{cls}, #{time}, #{iet}, #{money}, #{data}, #{settle}, #{state})
